description: Deterministic mapping from Signal types to executive recommendations.

OVER_BUDGET.title: Contain budget overrun
OVER_BUDGET.description: Review spend drivers for {project_name} and align burn with the approved target.
OVER_BUDGET.business_rationale: Sustained overspend reduces runway and limits portfolio flexibility.

UNDER_BUDGET.title: Review unused capacity
UNDER_BUDGET.description: Review unused capacity and evaluate acceleration opportunities for {project_name}.
UNDER_BUDGET.business_rationale: Budget headroom may fund acceleration or support reallocation to higher-priority work.

COST_SPIKE.title: Investigate cost spike
COST_SPIKE.description: Investigate the recent burn increase on {project_name} and validate planned scope changes.
COST_SPIKE.business_rationale: Sudden cost increases often indicate scope creep, staffing changes, or billing anomalies.

NO_COMMITS_7_DAYS.title: Check delivery activity
NO_COMMITS_7_DAYS.description: Confirm engineering activity on {project_name}; no commits were recorded in the last 7 days.
NO_COMMITS_7_DAYS.business_rationale: A week without commits may indicate blocked work, misconfigured repos, or paused delivery.

NO_COMMITS_14_DAYS.title: Verify project status
NO_COMMITS_14_DAYS.description: Verify project status and confirm development activity for {project_name}.
NO_COMMITS_14_DAYS.business_rationale: Two weeks without commits is a strong indicator of stalled delivery or incorrect tracking.

VELOCITY_DROP.title: Address velocity decline
VELOCITY_DROP.description: Review throughput on {project_name}; commit volume dropped materially week-over-week.
VELOCITY_DROP.business_rationale: Falling velocity can precede schedule slips if root causes are not identified early.

NO_JIRA_ACTIVITY.title: Validate delivery tracking
NO_JIRA_ACTIVITY.description: Validate Jira activity for {project_name}; no issue updates were recorded in the lookback window.
NO_JIRA_ACTIVITY.business_rationale: Missing issue activity reduces visibility into in-flight work and blockers.

CONNECTOR_FAILURE.title: Restore connector access
CONNECTOR_FAILURE.description: Restore connector access for {project_name} to improve briefing accuracy.
CONNECTOR_FAILURE.business_rationale: Failed connectors prevent reliable portfolio signals and executive reporting.

STALE_DATA.title: Refresh connector data
STALE_DATA.description: Refresh stale connector data for {project_name} to restore timely portfolio visibility.
STALE_DATA.business_rationale: Outdated metrics increase the risk of decisions based on expired information.

MISSING_OWNER.title: Assign project owner
MISSING_OWNER.description: Assign an accountable owner to {project_name} for budget and delivery oversight.
MISSING_OWNER.business_rationale: Unowned projects are harder to escalate and remediate across the portfolio.

UNUSED_CAPACITY.title: Evaluate spare capacity
UNUSED_CAPACITY.description: Evaluate spare team and budget capacity on {project_name} for reallocation or acceleration.
UNUSED_CAPACITY.business_rationale: Unused capacity represents an opportunity to shift resources toward strategic priorities.

RESOURCE_IMBALANCE.title: Rebalance portfolio staffing
RESOURCE_IMBALANCE.description: Reallocate effort toward higher-value initiatives; {project_name} is over-weighted on team size.
RESOURCE_IMBALANCE.business_rationale: Staffing imbalance can hide bottlenecks and reduce capital efficiency portfolio-wide.

HIGH_PERFORMING_PROJECT.title: Scale proven delivery
HIGH_PERFORMING_PROJECT.description: Consider expanding scope or sharing practices from {project_name}, which is under budget with strong activity.
HIGH_PERFORMING_PROJECT.business_rationale: High-performing projects offer reusable patterns and potential capacity for strategic bets.
